title: Kirchhoff's Voltage Law (KVL)
content: The algebraic sum of all voltages around any closed loop in a circuit is zero: Σ V_k = 0.
extended_content: KVL is a consequence of conservation of energy.  Sign convention: voltage drops are positive, voltage rises are negative (or vice-versa, as long as consistent).  Together with KCL it enables nodal and mesh analysis of any planar circuit.
source: Hayt & Kemmerly, Engineering Circuit Analysis, 8th ed.
